title: Recover from corrupted or stuck state
description: Diagnose a locked or corrupted state safely by backing up, confirming no live run, then surgically repairing.
body: Steps: 1. Pull and back up the current state (terraform state pull > backup.tfstate) before touching anything. 2. Determine whether a lock is held by an active run or an abandoned one. 3. If truly abandoned, force-unlock with the reported lock id, never blindly. 4. For corruption, repair via terraform state rm/mv/import against the backup, not hand-editing JSON. 5. Plan to confirm state matches reality. Rollback point: the backup taken in step 1. Validation: plan shows the intended state with no spurious destroys; if you cannot prove no live run holds the lock, escalate rather than force-unlock.
